executive_decision: Build a Chrome extension that turns Reddit pain evidence into phased implementation plans.
evidence_method: Pain themes derived from pinned Reddit evidence in a research session.
intelligence_report: Founders report workflow fragmentation between Reddit research and planning tools.
user_problem: Solo founders lose context when moving from Reddit threads to planning artifacts.
competitive_landscape: Pain monitoring tools exist but do not produce methodology-backed phase plans.
uvp: Browser-native pipeline from Reddit evidence to implemento-standard blueprints and phase 0 plans.
validation_experiments: Measure time-to-first-export and blind review of blueprint actionability.
prd: Capture evidence, discover pain themes, generate blueprint and phase 0, export markdown.
mvp_scope: Chrome MV3 extension with side panel, BYOK LLM, local storage. Exclude auto-posting and cloud sync.
architecture: Content script + service worker + side panel; local storage; LLM from service worker.
interfaces: Message bus between panel, worker, and content script; template engine for exports.
security: API keys in chrome.storage.local only; sanitize Reddit content; MV3 CSP.
delivery_map: Phase 0 foundations, phase 1 capture, phase 2 discovery, phase 3 planning, phase 4 posts, phase 5 release.
gtm: Problem-first posts in r/SaaS and r/sideproject; transparent build journey.
risks: DOM changes, LLM template drift, crowded pain-point market.
sources: Session pain themes and pinned Reddit evidence.
handoff: Phase 0 establishes extension scaffold, template engine, and repo layout for later phases.
